README.adoc.general_idea: Update the CI build status badge from Travis CI to GitHub Actions to reflect the migration of the continuous integration pipeline.
Update the Maven Central artifact link to point to the new Sonatype Central Publisher Portal URL instead of the legacy search URL.
Add documentation describing the purpose of the 'release' and 'strict' Maven profiles.
README.adoc.after:
- The `release` profile is meant for quick and easy releases to Maven Central. 
- The `strict` profile is meant for producing high quality artifacts. Use `mvn -P "release, strict"`.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade SLF4J API to version 2.0.12 to align with the Java 21 ecosystem and modern logging standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: SLF4J 1.7.x is legacy; while it might compile, it lacks support for newer logging frameworks and may cause runtime conflicts with dependencies expecting SLF4J 2.x.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava to version 33.4.8-jre to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and receive security fixes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Guava versions may rely on deprecated internal APIs removed or restricted in Java 21, leading to runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JUnit BOM to version 5.10.2 to ensure test compatibility with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JUnit 5 versions may have issues running on Java 21 due to changes in the JVM or module system.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Logback Classic to version 1.5.3 to ensure compatibility with SLF4J 2.x and Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Logback 1.2.x is incompatible with SLF4J 2.x APIs, causing runtime linkage errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the maven-enforcer-plugin to enforce dependency convergence and upper bounds.
Refactor SCM and URL configurations to use a ${github-repository} variable for better maintainability.
Move plugin configurations from the 'release' profile to the main 'pluginManagement' section for better reuse.
Add a 'strict' profile for stricter javadoc and checkstyle enforcement.
Update developer email and organization details to reflect current affiliation.
Update the checkstyle configuration URL to point to the new 'Practical-Google-style' repository.
Remove the explicit Java 11 API link from javadoc configuration as it is no longer relevant for Java 21.
Add 'doclint none' to the release profile javadoc configuration to suppress warnings during release builds.
Move logback-classic from direct dependencies to dependencyManagement to allow consumers to control scope.
